heroSubtitle: Your budget. Your data. Your rules.
privacyHeading: Your data never leaves your server.
privacyBody: Actual syncs to a server you control — your home, your NAS, or a private VPS. No company reads your finances.
featuresHeading: Budget the way it actually works.
featuresSubtitle: Every dollar has a job. Track it without the guilt.
cardEnvelopeBody: Assign every dollar to a category before you spend it.
cardAccountsBody: Checking, savings, cards — all in one place with live balances.
cardInsightsBody: See exactly where your money goes, by month.
